meaning: n.一段情节,[音]插曲,插话,有趣的事件
examples: The final episode will be shown next Sunday.
It makes you want to watch the next episode to find out what's going to happen.
The first episode is the real first episode, which tells about the destruction of the earth.
Celebrity chef Maggie Beer discovered on an episode of Who Do You Think You Are?
The episode fed criticism that the specialist system is antiquated and needed to go.
